author: lOrm
content: All mandated refactors from the original issue are now implemented: (1) hostname denylist for metadata endpoints; (2) IpAddr-based forbidden-range checks replacing all string-prefix heuristics; (3) decimal-integer and hex-integer IPv4 parsing via parse_host_as_ip(); (4) full IPv6 matrix (fc00::/7, fe80::/10, 2002::/16, 2001::/32, IPv4-mapped) via is_ipv6_forbidden(); (5) DNS resolution via ToSocketAddrs with every returned address validated; (6) unit tests for all bypass vectors. Residual risk (DNS rebinding at dial-time) documented in validate_url docstring, tracked as crosslink #335.
